scripts.dev: tsx ../../packages/infisical-runner/src/cli.ts api dev -- tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.dev:worker: tsx ../../packages/infisical-runner/src/cli.ts api dev -- pnpm dlx wrangler dev --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.deploy: tsx ../../packages/infisical-runner/src/cli.ts api deploy -- pnpm dlx wrangler deploy --config wrangler.jsonc --env=""
scripts.deploy:preview: tsx ../../packages/infisical-runner/src/cli.ts api deploy:preview -- pnpm dlx wrangler versions upload --config wrangler.jsonc --env preview
scripts.deploy:staging: tsx ../../packages/infisical-runner/src/cli.ts api deploy:staging -- pnpm dlx wrangler deploy --config wrangler.jsonc --env staging
